Change Sheet Properties.description: Update Google Sheets properties like frozen rows/columns, sheet position, and visibility settings.

Clear Spreadsheet Row(s).description: Clears the contents of the selected row(s) while keeping the row(s) intact in the spreadsheet.

Copy Range.description: Copy data from one range to another within a Google Sheets spreadsheet, with options for what to paste (values, formatting, etc.).

Copy Worksheet.description: Creates a new worksheet by copying an existing worksheet.

Create Conditional Formatting Rule.description: Apply conditional formatting to cells in a Google Sheets spreadsheet based on their values.

Create Multiple Spreadsheet Rows.description: Create one or more new rows in a specific spreadsheet (with line item support).

Create Spreadsheet.description: Creates a new spreadsheet. Choose from a blank spreadsheet, a copy of an existing one, or one with headers.

Create Spreadsheet Column.description: Create a new column in a specific spreadsheet.

Create Spreadsheet Row.description: Create a new row in a specific spreadsheet.

Create Spreadsheet Row at Top.description: Creates a new spreadsheet row at the top of a spreadsheet (after the header row).

Create Worksheet.description: Creates a new worksheet in a Google Sheet.

Delete Sheet.description: Permanently delete a worksheet from a Google Sheets spreadsheet. Warning: This action cannot be undone.

Delete Spreadsheet Row(s).description: Deletes the selected row(s) from the spreadsheet. This action removes the row(s) and all associated data.

Format Cell Range.description: Apply date, number, or style formatting (colors, bold, italic, strikethrough) to a range of cells in a Google Sheets spreadsheet.

Format Spreadsheet Row.description: Format a row in a specific spreadsheet.

Rename Sheet.description: Rename a worksheet in a Google Sheets spreadsheet.

Set Data Validation.description: Set data validation rules on a range of cells in Google Sheets to control what data can be entered.

Sort Range.description: Sort data within a specified range in Google Sheets by a chosen column in ascending or descending order.

Update Spreadsheet Row.description: Update a row in a specific spreadsheet with optional formatting.

Update Spreadsheet Row(s).description: Update one or more rows in a specific spreadsheet (with line item support).

API Request (Beta).description: This is an advanced action which makes a raw HTTP request that includes this integration's authentication.

Find Worksheet.description: Finds a worksheet by title. Optionally, create a worksheet if none are found.

Get Data Range.description: Get data from a specific range in a Google Spreadsheet using A1 notation (e.g., "A1:D10", "B2:E5").

Get Many Spreadsheet Rows (Advanced).description: Return up to 1,500 rows as a single JSON value or as line items.

Get Row by ID.description: Get a specific spreadsheet row by its row number (ID). Row 1 is typically the header row.

Get Spreadsheet by ID.description: Get a specific Google Spreadsheet by its ID. Returns the raw spreadsheet data from the Google Sheets API.

Lookup Spreadsheet Row.description: Find a specific spreadsheet row based on a column and value. If found, it returns the entire row. Optionally, create a spreadsheet row if none are found.

Lookup Spreadsheet Rows (Advanced).description: Find up to 500 rows based on a column and value as line items.
